attacking_style: Launches solo moves from established breakaways on hard climbs, particularly HC categorized ascents. Prioritizes mountain points and extended efforts over 20km+ from finish.
team_tactics: Operates with freedom in breakaways without heavy team support visible. Given autonomy to pursue KOM classification and opportunistic stage threats from distance.
terrain_preference: HC and category 1 climbs where he can distance breakaway companions. Capable on wet technical descents to extend advantages gained on climbs.
vulnerability: Lacks team firepower to control from front; relies on breakaway success rather than GC team support. Long-range attacks may fade if caught by organized chase.
key_patterns: Solos clear from breakaways on major climbs rather than waiting for final (2 races)
Targets KOM classification actively, winning multiple mountain sprints per race (2 races)
Attacks with 20km+ remaining, sustaining long-range efforts to threaten results (2 races)
Strong technical descending skills to consolidate climbing gains in wet conditions (1 race, 1 implied)
form_trajectory: positive: Demonstrated consistent climbing strength across March-June 2018, threatening GC riders and dominating breakaway KOM contests
